title: Facilitator Guide — Day 18 — Build the Business Engine
prepChecklist: Confirm Playbook Business Engine worksheet fields are accessible
Brief mentors: morning is numbers narrative; afternoon is reverse-engineer workshop

sessionFlow.activity: Deck 01 Scenes 1–3 — Build the Engine, success in numbers, dream to habits
Deck 01 Scenes 4–5 — Dream Income Worksheet + 10-5-3-1-3 Business Engine
Deck 01 Scenes 6–8 — Leadership Engine, Three Engines, Master/Multiply/Scale
sessionFlow.notes: Connect personal production to leadership leverage.

sessionFlow.activity: Workshop Scenes 9–10 — Build Your Business Engine
sessionFlow.notes: Squads reverse-engineer annual goal to daily activities.

debriefQuestions: Can participants reverse-engineer from income goal to daily activities?
Do their three engines connect into one enterprise story?
What shifts from Master to Multiply to Scale for their venture?
commonPitfalls: Skipping weekly/daily breakdown — staying only at annual goals
Treating leadership income as separate from personal production
coachingTips: Use the 10-5-3-1-3 model as the anchor for activity planning
